_comment: Second Brain config — exposes the full-arch-crm Karpathy wiki vault to Claude Code via MCP. On session start Claude calls wiki_context to load the entire system state without any manual summary pasting.

full-arch-crm.description: full-arch-crm MCP server — Karpathy wiki, clinical tools, agent playbooks, insurance intelligence. HIPAA-compliant ops_safe data only via wiki tools.

on_session_start._comment: Second Brain auto-load: pulls full system context from wiki vault. No session summary needed.

wiki_context.description: ALWAYS call first. Loads full-arch-crm system state from Karpathy wiki — architecture, agents, active work, recent changes. Replaces manual session summaries.

wiki_query.description: Ask the wiki any clinical or operational question before making decisions. Grounds responses in accumulated institutional knowledge.

wiki_ingest.description: Push new learnings, patterns, fixes, or decisions into the wiki for persistence across sessions.

wiki_lint.description: Weekly maintenance — removes stale entries, resolves contradictions, refreshes KPIs.

context_injection.system_prompt_prepend: You are working on full-arch-crm, an AI-native dental PMS SaaS. The system uses the Karpathy wiki pattern — always call wiki_context at session start and wiki_query before any clinical or architectural decision. The wiki is your persistent memory across all sessions. Never re-explain architecture that should be in the wiki — query it instead.
reminders: Call wiki_context if you haven't yet this session
Call wiki_query before any agent decision or code change
Call wiki_ingest to preserve any important discovery or fix
PHI never enters the wiki — ops_safe patterns only
